datasource_validation.note: Dashboard queries reference 'governance' bucket which does not exist. InfluxDB datasource is healthy but target bucket needs to be created for dashboard to display data.

panels.title: Files Ingested (Last 24h)
panels.query: from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "governance.tempmemory.ingestion.files" and r.status == "ingested") |> last()

panels.title: Files Failed
panels.query: from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "governance.tempmemory.ingestion.files" and r.status == "failed") |> last()

panels.title: Success Rate
panels.query: from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "governance.tempmemory.ingestion.success_rate") |> last()

panels.title: Ingestion Duration
panels.query: from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "governance.tempmemory.ingestion.duration") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Files by Status
panels.query: from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "governance.tempmemory.ingestion.files") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.status != "processed")

panels.title: Files by Type
panels.query: from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "governance.tempmemory.files.by_type") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.memory_type != "unknown")

panels.title: Ingestion Trend
queries: from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "governance.tempmemory.ingestion.files" and r.status == "ingested") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "governance.tempmemory.ingestion.files" and r.status == "failed") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Migration Status Over Time
queries: from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "governance.tempmemory.migration.files" and r.status == "migrated")
from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "governance.tempmemory.migration.files" and r.status == "failed")
from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "governance.tempmemory.migration.files" and r.status == "skipped")

panels.title: Last Run Status
panels.query: from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "governance.tempmemory.ingestion.last_run_success") |> last()

panels.title: Last Run Age
panels.query: from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "governance.tempmemory.ingestion.last_run_age") |> last()

panels.title: Backlog
panels.query: from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "governance.tempmemory.ingestion.backlog") |> last()

panels.title: Consecutive Failures
panels.query: from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "governance.tempmemory.ingestion.consecutive_failures") |> last()

validation_results.data_availability: FAIL - governance bucket does not exist
validation_results.panel_queries: PASS - all queries are syntactically correct Flux
validation_results.thresholds_configuration: PASS - all panels have appropriate thresholds

issues_found.issue: Governance bucket does not exist in InfluxDB
issues_found.impact: Dashboard panels will show 'No Data' until the bucket is created and populated
issues_found.recommendation: Create the 'governance' bucket in InfluxDB and configure the tempmemory ingestion runner to write metrics to it

issues_found.impact: None - UID is valid and unique

recommendations: Create the 'governance' InfluxDB bucket via Terraform or InfluxDB API
Configure the tempmemory ingestion runner to emit metrics to the governance bucket
Verify metrics are being written by querying: from(bucket: "governance") |> range(start: -1h) |> limit(n: 5)
Consider adding a 'test data' button or sample data generator for development/testing

commands_run.result: Datasource healthy - chiseai-influxdb (ChiseAI InfluxDB) - 3 buckets found

overall_status: PARTIAL - Dashboard configured correctly but requires governance bucket for data display
